sizing_rule.note: Fractional f position sizing: Use full f (1.0) for maximum growth, or fractional variants (0.2f, 0.1f) to reduce drawdown and volatility. Position Size = Base Contracts × f_fraction. Lower f values inversely reduce standard deviation and drawdown risk.

source_rule_text: Use fractional f position sizing (full f, 0.2f, or 0.1f) to scale contract quantities and manage risk-adjusted returns based on geometric and arithmetic mean performance metrics.
